labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541214 ($22,102,632,622) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541214 ($27,322,843,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $98,054 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541214); class <5: 2,110 firms, avg revenue/firm $581,493 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $91,004 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 662 firms, avg revenue/firm $919,816 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $143,951 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 480 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,588,508 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $248,602 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 741 firms, avg revenue/firm $4,599,022 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $719,747 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 297 firms, avg revenue/firm $13,560,636 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,122,240 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 194 firms, avg revenue/firm $89,119,103 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $13,947,140 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 297
